title: Dexible - REKT
relevance_summary: Self-defined routing without on-chain verification leading to token transferFrom attack

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls selfSwap() with a non-DEX router address
prevention.trigger: selfSwap() -> transferFrom() with non-DEX router address

red_flags: Non-DEX router address used in selfSwap()
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls selfSwap() with a non-DEX router address
summary: Dexible's v2 contracts allowed users to define their own routing via selfSwap(), but failed to verify if the router address was a DEX. Hackers exploited this by calling a token contract to transferFrom any account with spend approval on the Dexible contract, resulting in significant losses.
